message.content:
@startuml
title 登录验证

participant "WEB" as WEB
participant "API" as API
participant "PMS" as PMS
participant "Cache" as Cache
participant "Redis" as Redis

activate WEB
activate API

WEB -> API: 登录请求，用户名密码
activate PMS
API -> PMS: 验证
PMS --> API: 验证完成，返回GUID
deactivate PMS

API -> Cache: 缓存信息
activate Cache
API -> Redis: 如果开启，向redis存储数据
deactivate Cache
deactivate Redis

API --> WEB: 返回登录信息 access_token(guid)
deactivate API

activate WEB
activate API

WEB -> API: SET HTTP HEADER "Authorization: Bearer access_token"
activate Cache
API -> Cache: 从缓存读取，验证
Cache --> API: 返回
deactivate Cache

API -> Redis: 如果开启，Cache没有从redis读取
activate Redis
Redis --> API: 返回
deactivate Redis

API -> API: 验证有效
API --> WEB: 失败，http code 401
deactivate API
deactivate WEB

@enduml
